title: triticum litorale var. glaucum
intro: Triticum litorale var. glaucum is a variety of the coastal wheat grass, a type of wild grass that belongs to the wheat family. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory effects, which can be used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Triticum litorale var. glaucum include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting immune function. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, tinctures, or infusions, which can be used to promote overall well-being and alleviate symptoms of various ailments.
